notes: Connects the Clean V3 comments banner action route comments_banner:home.
Banner status is stored per post in ak_post_settings_v3.banner_enabled.
The fix touches only the comments banner action path and does not change OpenApp comments launch.
Comments enable/disable from CC6.5.8.0 remains included.
Main route guard from CC6.5.8.1 remains included.
Post registry sync and store backfill remain active.
Single active menu remains enabled and activeMenu message_id is tracked.
